channel.title: motion blur on Amin's Den
channel.description: Recent content in motion blur on Amin's Den

item.title: Optimizing A Motion Blur Effect
item.description: Recently, I wanted to explore different Motion Blur techniques being used in the Video Game Industry. Now, I have decided to write down the result of this short research of mine. At the first glance, I found several per-pixel motion blur approaches, but they did not impress me. To explain why I was not satisfied with the results, some history lessons are required! Screen-space Motion Blur My main issue with the trivial approaches was that it would only take the camera motion into account.
